features.name: Project Verification Baseline
features.description: Confirm make build and make test pass from a clean checkout
features.evidence: make build passes, make test passes

features.name: Build Mole from Source (submodule)
features.description: Replace pre-built Vendor/MoleRuntime with git submodule at Vendor/Mole. Build Go binaries (status-go, analyze-go) from source during make app.
doneCriteria: make app builds Go binaries from source
make app bundles correct runtime artifacts
App launches and calls mo commands successfully

subTasks.name: Update build_app.sh
subTasks.evidence: builds Go binaries, copies only runtime artifacts

subTasks.name: Full build + launch verify
subTasks.evidence: make app + app launches, runtime version 1.40.0

features.evidence: make app passes. Go binaries built native arm64. App launches, calls /Applications/MoleMac.app/Contents/Resources/MoleRuntime/mo. Version: 1.40.0

features.name: App Icon
features.description: Convert icon.png to AppIcon.icns and bundle it in the app.
features.evidence: AppIcon.icns generated (39KB, valid ic07). build_app.sh copies it.

features.name: Auto-Refresh Status Tab
features.description: Add 30s timer to StatusView for live system metrics with Live indicator.
features.evidence: All 5 features implemented and working. macOS 26.5 .toolbar crash fixed by removing .toolbar (SwiftUI incompatibility). App launches with 1 window, dark mode works.

features.name: Sort/Filter in Uninstall & Purge
features.description: Add sort picker (size/name) and search field to UninstallView and PurgeView.
doneCriteria: UninstallView has sort picker and search
PurgeView has sort picker and search
Default sort is by size descending

subTasks.name: Sort enum + search state in UninstallView
Sort enum + search state in PurgeView

features.evidence: Both views have sort picker (Size ↓, Name A-Z) and .searchable. make build passes.

features.name: Real Uninstall Execution
features.description: Add executeUninstall to MoService and confirmation dialog to UninstallView.

subTasks.name: Add runTrigger + confirmation dialog to UninstallView

features.evidence: executeUninstall runs mo uninstall appName. ConfirmationDialog shows before execution. make build passes.

features.name: Dark Mode
features.description: Add dark mode token variants to DesignTokens and remove forced light appearance.
doneCriteria: All views readable in both themes

subTasks.name: Add adaptive() helper and dark color variants

features.evidence: All tokens use adaptive(light:dark:). App follows system colorScheme. make build passes.

features.name: Permissions / Full Disk Access Finish
features.description: Finish the existing Permissions feature by surfacing the Analyze preflight banner and refreshing tracking artifacts. FDA probe intentionally left unchanged pending controller runtime verification.
doneCriteria: AnalyzeView shows the same PreflightBanner pattern as CleanView and OptimizeView
ContentView passes the shared PermissionsService into AnalyzeView
feature_list.json and session-handoff.md reflect the Permissions feature state
Controller runtime-verified the Analyze preflight banner renders (screenshot); FDA not-granted branch deferred to a documented manual check

subTasks.name: Add Analyze preflight banner
subTasks.evidence: Sources/Views/AnalyzeView.swift adds @ObservedObject permissions and PreflightBanner(item: .analyze, permissions: permissions). Sources/ContentView.swift passes permissions into AnalyzeView.

subTasks.name: FDA probe not-granted branch
subTasks.evidence: Cannot be exercised from an FDA-enabled environment (probe reads Granted). Documented as a manual check in session-handoff.md: revoke Full Disk Access for MoleMac, relaunch, expect Permissions card + preflight banners to read 'Not granted'. If still 'Granted', repoint probe from ~/Library/.../TCC.db to /Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db. PermissionsService.probeFullDiskAccess intentionally unchanged until that check runs.

subTasks.name: Refresh tracking artifacts
subTasks.evidence: feature_list.json entry added; session-handoff.md refreshed for feat-008.

features.evidence: Scope: Analyze banner wiring + tracking only (4 files; no Status files or PermissionsService touched). swift build passes. Controller runtime-verified: Analyze tab renders the PreflightBanner showing 'Full Disk Access', no crash. Pre-existing analyze-data decode error observed (unrelated to this feature; reported separately). FDA not-granted branch is a documented manual check (see session-handoff.md).
